name: Zhiyun Weebill 3S Handheld Gimbal Stabilizer
description: With wireless shutter capabilities, improved fill light, and Sling Mode 2.5, the WEEBILL-3 S Handheld Gimbal Stabilizer from Zhiyun builds on the features of its predecessor to create a high-performing gimbal for your next run-and-gun shoot.

features.Key Features:: Optimized 2.5 Sling Structure | Extendable Sling Grip, Wrist Rest | Integrated 1000 Lux Fill Light | Up to 11.5-Hour Runtime | 0.96" Touchscreen, Bluetooth Shutter | Quick Release, Landscape/Portrait Switch | Tripod Extension, Backpack | Control Wheel, Trigger Button | Various Control Cables for DSLR Cameras | 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi for App Control
features.Standard Pacakge: Zhiyun WEEBILL-3 S Handheld Gimbal Stabilizer with Built-In Fill Light | C120 Tripod | 2 x Quick Release Plate | Lens Support | Camera Backing Base | USB-A to USB-C Charging Cable | Sony Control Cable | 2 x Canon Control Cable | Panasonic Control Cable | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
features.Combo: Zhiyun WEEBILL-3 S Handheld Gimbal Stabilizer Combo with Extendable Grip Set and Backpack | C120 Tripod | 2 x Quick Release Plate | Lens Support | Camera Backing Base | USB-A to USB-C Charging Cable | Sony Control Cable | 2 x Canon Control Cable | Panasonic Control Cable | Wrist Rest | Base Mount | Extendable Sling Grip | Backpack
